name: sociology
description: Analyze systemic effects — power structures, social stratification, institutional impact, community fabric, and network diffusion. Reveals how decisions affect groups, classes, and communities at scale. Usable standalone or as a meta-layer on any other plugin's output.

skills.name: soc_power
skills.description: Analyze power dynamics — who gains power, who loses it, what institutions are strengthened or weakened. Makes invisible power visible.

skills.name: soc_stratification
skills.description: Analyze effects on social stratification — does this widen or narrow gaps between groups economically, informationally, structurally, or socially?

skills.name: soc_institutional
skills.description: Analyze institutional impact — how professions, organizations, regulatory frameworks, and social norms are changed, challenged, or reinforced.

skills.name: soc_community
skills.description: Analyze community effects — social ties, local identity, shared resources, collective action capacity, and social cohesion.

skills.name: soc_diffusion
skills.description: Analyze how ideas, products, and information spread through social networks. Identifies gatekeepers, diffusion barriers, and who gets left out.

skills.name: soc_stakeholder_map
skills.description: Map ALL affected stakeholders including those excluded from consideration. Uses four-tier identification: primary (named), direct (unnamed but affected), ripple (indirect/second-order), and excluded (affected but absent from consideration).

commands.name: soc_power_check
commands.description: Quick Power Check — who gains, who loses, who's not represented

commands.name: soc_equity_check
commands.description: Quick Equity Check — widens or narrows inequality, key barrier

commands.name: soc_institution_check
commands.description: Quick Institution Check — what's being strengthened, weakened, or transformed

commands.name: soc_community_check
commands.description: Quick Community Check — community cost and social capital effect

commands.name: soc_exclusion_check
commands.description: Quick Exclusion Check — who is excluded and why
